name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, turn, i

(* State can be "idle", "trying", or "critical" *)
State == {"idle", "trying", "critical"}

(* Initial state: all processes are idle, turn is 1 *)
Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn = 1

(* Process i's transition *)
Proc(i) == 
  (* Trying to enter critical section *)
  /\ state[i] = "idle"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
  /\ turn' = turn
  (* Entering critical section *)
  \/ state[i] = "trying" /\ turn = i
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
  /\ turn' = turn
  (* Exiting critical section *)
  \/ state[i] = "critical"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
  /\ turn' = i + 1

(* Next-state relation: any process can make a transition *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N: Proc(i)

(* Invariant: at most one process is in the critical section *)
TypeOK == Cardinality({i \in 1..N : state[i] = "critical"}) <= 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommitProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Participants, Coordinator

VARIABLES state, votes, messages

Init == /\ state = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
        /\ votes = [p \in Participants |-> "None"]
        /\ messages = <<>>

Prepare == /\ state = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
          /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> "Prepare"])
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Prepare"]
          /\ votes' = votes
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

VoteYes == /\ state = [p \in Participants |-> "Prepare"]
           /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> p, receiver |-> Coordinator, type |-> "VoteYes"])
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "VoteYes"]
           /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "VoteYes"]
           /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

VoteNo == /\ state = [p \in Participants |-> "Prepare"]
          /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> p, receiver |-> Coordinator, type |-> "VoteNo"])
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "VoteNo"]
          /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "VoteNo"]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Commit == /\ state = [p \in Participants |-> "VoteYes"]
          /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> "Commit"])
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Commit"]
          /\ votes' = votes
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Abort == /\ state = [p \in Participants |-> "VoteYes"] \/ state = [p \in Participants |-> "VoteNo"]
         /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> Coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> "Abort"])
         /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Abort"]
         /\ votes' = votes
         /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Next == Prepare \/ VoteYes \/ VoteNo \/ Commit \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, votes, messages>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [Participants -> {"Init", "Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]
          /\ votes \in [Participants -> {"None", "VoteYes", "VoteNo"}]
          /\ messages \in Seq([sender -> Coordinator \cup Participants)

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

\* State of each philosopher: "thinking", "hungry", or "eating"
VARIABLES philosophers, forks

Init == /\ philosophers = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]
        /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> TRUE]  \* TRUE means fork i is free

\* Helper predicates
LeftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

\* Philosopher i picks up left fork
PickLeft(i) == forks[LeftFork(i)] = TRUE /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = FALSE]

\* Philosopher i picks up right fork
PickRight(i) == forks[RightFork(i)] = TRUE /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![RightFork(i)] = FALSE]

\* Philosopher i puts down left fork
PutLeft(i) == forks[LeftFork(i)] = FALSE /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = TRUE]

\* Philosopher i puts down right fork
PutRight(i) == forks[RightFork(i)] = FALSE /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![RightFork(i)] = TRUE]

\* Philosopher i starts eating
StartEating(i) == philosophers[i] = "hungry" /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

\* Philosopher i stops eating
StopEating(i) == philosophers[i] = "eating" /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

\* Philosopher i becomes hungry
BecomeHungry(i) == philosophers[i] = "thinking" /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]

\* Transition for philosopher i
Philosopher(i) == 
  \/ /\ philosophers[i] = "thinking" /\ BecomeHungry(i)
  \/ /\ philosophers[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[LeftFork(i)] /\ forks[RightFork(i)] /\ PickLeft(i) /\ PickRight(i) /\ StartEating(i)
  \/ /\ philosophers[i] = "eating" /\ PutLeft(i) /\ PutRight(i) /\ StopEating(i)

Next == \E i \in 1..N: Philosopher(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosophers, forks>>

TypeOK == /\ philosophers \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ forks \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
VARIABLES flag, num


vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          \/ /\ flag[i] = FALSE
             /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
             /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = Max(num) + 1]
             /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          \/ /\ flag[i] = TRUE
             /\ num' = num
             /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ num \in [i \in 1..N |-> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [i \in 1..N |-> BOOLEAN]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ q[tail] = 0
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ size' = size + 1
                 /\ head' = head

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ q[head] = 1
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ size' = size - 1
                 /\ tail' = tail

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K
          /\ \A i \in 1..K: q[i] \in {0,1}

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, majority, NULL

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state, hasn

(* State can be "Follower", "Candidate", or "Leader" *)

Init == 
    /\ currentTerm = 0
    /\ votedFor = [s \in 1..N |-> NULL]
    /\ state = [s \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

(* A server can become a candidate if it hasn't voted for anyone in its current term *)
BecomeCandidate(s) == 
    /\ state[s] = "Follower"
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
    /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]

(* A server can become a leader if it receives votes from a majority *)
BecomeLeader(s) == 
    /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
    /\ \E t \in 1..currentTerm : 
        \E votes \in 1..N \ {s} : 
            Cardinality({v \in votes : votedFor[v] = s}) >= majority
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]

(* A server can become a follower if it receives a message with a higher term *)
BecomeFollower(s, t) == 
    /\ state[s] = "Candidate" \/ state[s] = "Leader"
    /\ t > currentTerm
    /\ currentTerm' = t
    /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = NULL]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Follower"]

Next == 
    \E s \in 1..N : 
        /\ state' = state
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        \/ BecomeCandidate(s)
        \/ BecomeLeader(s)
        \/ \E t \in 1..currentTerm : BecomeFollower(s, t)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

TypeOK == 
    /\ currentTerm \in Nat
    /\ votedFor \in [1..N -> {NULL} \cup 1..N]
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}]

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
  /\ readers = <<>> 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == 
  /\ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) :
        /\ readers[r] = TRUE
        /\ readers' = Replace(readers, r, FALSE)
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  \/ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) :
        /\ readers[r] = FALSE
        /\ readers' = Replace(readers, r, TRUE)
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
     /\ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) : readers[r] = FALSE
     /\ writer_active' = TRUE
     /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Channels, InitState, InitChannelState
VARIABLES ChannelState, State


vars == <<State, ChannelState>>

Init == /\ State = [p \in 1..N |-> InitState(p)]
        /\ ChannelState = [c \in Channels |-> InitChannelState(c)]

Next == /\ \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ State' = [State EXCEPT ![p] = NextState(p, State(p))]
          /\ ChannelState' = ChannelState
        \/ \E (p, q) \in Channels :
          /\ ChannelState' = [ChannelState EXCEPT ![(p, q)] = Append(ChannelState[(p, q)], Marker)]
          /\ State' = State

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ State \in [1..N -> InitState(1)..InitState(N)]
          /\ ChannelState \in [Channels -> InitChannelState(1)..InitChannelState(N)]
--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- The algorithm records the local state of each process and the state of each incoming channel.
-- When a process records its state, it sends a marker message along each outgoing channel.
-- The state of a channel is the sequence of messages received after the process recorded its state and before it received a marker on that channel.
--------------------------------------------------------------------
\* The following definitions are placeholders for the actual algorithm logic.
NextState(p, s) == s + 1
InitState(p) == 0
InitChannelState(c) == 0
Marker == "MARKER"

\* TLC configuration
\* SPECIFICATION Spec
\* INVARIANT TypeOK

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES token, nodes

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ nodes = [i \in 1..N |-> [sent \in BOOLEAN, received \in BOOLEAN]]

Next == /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
        /\ UNCHANGED nodes

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, nodes>>

TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N
          /\ nodes \in [1..N -> [sent \in BOOLEAN, received \in BOOLEAN]]

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, NULL, Values
VARIABLES ops, results, store


// Operation representation
Put(k, v) == [type |-> "Put", key |-> k, value |-> v]
Get(k)   == [type |-> "Get", key |-> k]

Init == /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]
        /\ ops = <<>>
        /\ results = [i \in 1..0 |-> NULL] // empty mapping

Next ==
    \/ /\ ops' = Append(ops, Put(k, v))
        /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
        /\ results' = results
    \/ /\ ops' = Append(ops, Get(k))
        /\ store' = store
        /\ results' = [results EXCEPT ![Len(ops)+1] = IF Len(ops) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE
                       LET lastPut == CHOOSE o \in 1..Len(ops) : ops[o].type = "Put" /\ ops[o].key = k
                       IN IF lastPut = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ops[lastPut].value]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<store, ops, results>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store, ops, results>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ store \in [Keys -> Values \cup {NULL}]
    /\ ops \in Seq(Put(k) \in [type |-> "Put", key |-> k, value |-> v] \cup Get(k) \in [type |-> "Get", key |-> k] : Keys \cup Values)
    /\ results \in [1..Len(ops) -> Values \cup {NULL}]

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, a, b

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

Init == 
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [promised \in 1..N |-> 0, accepted \in 1..N |-> 0, value \in V : 0]]
  /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [ballot \in 1..N |-> 0, value \in V |-> 0]]
  /\ chosen = 0

Prepare(i, a, b) == 
  /\ acceptors[a].promised[b] = 0
  /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![a].promised[b] = b]
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Promise(i, a, b, a', b', v) == 
  /\ acceptors[a].promised[b] = b
  /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![a].promised[b] = b]
  /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![i].value = IF b' > proposers[i].ballot THEN v ELSE proposers[i].value]
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Accept(i, a, b, v) == 
  /\ acceptors[a].promised[b] = b
  /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![a].accepted[b] = b, ![a].value[b] = v]
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Accepted(i, a, b, v) == 
  /\ acceptors[a].promised[b] = b
  /\ acceptors[a].accepted[b] = b
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ chosen' = IF chosen = 0 THEN v ELSE chosen

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..M : \E a \in 1..N : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V :
    \/ Prepare(i, a, b)
    \/ Promise(i, a, b, a, b, v)
    \/ Accept(i, a, b, v)
    \/ Accepted(i, a, b, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [promised \in 1..N -> Int, accepted \in 1..N -> Int, value \in V -> Int]]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot \in 1..N -> Int, value \in V -> Int]]
  /\ chosen \in V

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, TLC
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y


CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES ackedChunks, chunks, file, retransmitCount, sentChunks, state


(* Define the possible states of the sender *)
SenderStates == {"Idle", "Sending", "WaitingForAck", "Finished", "Failed"}

(* Initialize the sender *)
Init == /\ state = "Idle"
        /\ file = Seq(1..FILE_SIZE) \* the file is represented as a sequence of bytes
        /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 
                        SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, Min(i*CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE))]
        /\ sentChunks = {}
        /\ ackedChunks = {}
        /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 0]

(* Define the action of sending a chunk *)
SendChunk == /\ state = "Idle"
             /\ nextChunk \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
             /\ nextChunk \notin sentChunks
             /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {nextChunk}
             /\ state' = "Sending"
             /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount>>

(* Define the action of receiving an acknowledgment *)
ReceiveAck == /\ state = "Sending"
             /\ nextChunk \in sentChunks
             /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks \cup {nextChunk}
             /\ state' = "WaitingForAck"
             /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

(* Define the action of retransmitting a chunk *)
RetransmitChunk == /\ state = "WaitingForAck"
                  /\ nextChunk \in sentChunks \setminus ackedChunks
                  /\ retransmitCount[nextChunk] < MAX_RETRIES
                  /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![nextChunk] = @ + 1]
                  /\ state' = "Sending"
                  /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks>>

(* Define the action of finishing the transmission *)
Finish == /\ state = "WaitingForAck"
          /\ sentChunks = ackedChunks
          /\ state' = "Finished"
          /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

(* Define the action of failing the transmission *)
Fail == /\ state = "WaitingForAck"
        /\ EXISTS nextChunk \in sentChunks \setminus ackedChunks:
            retransmitCount[nextChunk] >= MAX_RETRIES
        /\ state' = "Failed"
        /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

(* Define the next state relation *)
Next == \/ SendChunk
       \/ ReceiveAck
       \/ RetransmitChunk
       \/ Finish
       \/ Fail

(* Define the specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount>>

(* Define the type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in SenderStates
          /\ file \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
          /\ chunks \in [1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) -> Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)]
          /\ sentChunks \subseteq 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
          /\ ackedChunks \subseteq 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
          /\ retransmitCount \in [1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) -> Nat]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

====

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolationDB ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Keys

VARIABLES db, txns, nextTxId

(* db: mapping from key to value *)
(* txns: mapping from transaction id to transaction state *)
(* nextTxId: next transaction id to assign *)

(* Transaction states *)
TxState == [id: Nat, status: {"active", "committed", "aborted"},
            readSet: [key \in Keys(db) -> Nat],
            writeSet: [key \in Keys(db) -> Nat]]

(* Initialize the database and transaction manager *)
Init == /\ db = [k \in Keys(db) |-> 0]
        /\ txns = [ ]
        /\ nextTxId = 1

(* Begin a new transaction *)
BeginTx == 
  LET txId == nextTxId
  IN /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId + 1
     /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId] = [id |-> txId,
                                          status |-> "active",
                                          readSet |-> [k \in Keys(db) |-> 0],
                                          writeSet |-> [k \in Keys(db) |-> 0]]]
     /\ UNCHANGED db

(* Read a key within a transaction *)
Read(k) == 
  LET txId == CHOOSE t \in Keys(txns) : txns[t].status = "active"
  IN /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId].readSet[k] = db[k]]
     /\ UNCHANGED db

(* Write a key within a transaction *)
Write(k, v) == 
  LET txId == CHOOSE t \in Keys(txns) : txns[t].status = "active"
  IN /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId].writeSet[k] = v]
     /\ UNCHANGED db

(* Commit a transaction *)
Commit == 
  LET txId == CHOOSE t \in Keys(txns) : txns[t].status = "active"
      readSet == txns[txId].readSet
      writeSet == txns[txId].writeSet
      conflict == \E k \in Keys(db) : readSet[k] # db[k] /\ writeSet[k] # 0
  IN /\ conflict => /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId].status = "aborted"]
                    /\ UNCHANGED db
     /\ \A k \in Keys(db) : writeSet[k] = 0 => /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId].status = "committed"]
                                               /\ UNCHANGED db
     /\ \A k \in Keys(db) : writeSet[k] # 0 => /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId].status = "committed"]
                                               /\ db' = [db EXCEPT ![k] = writeSet[k]]
                                               /\ UNCHANGED txns

(* Abort a transaction *)
Abort == 
  LET txId == CHOOSE t \in Keys(txns) : txns[t].status = "active"
  IN /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId].status = "aborted"]
     /\ UNCHANGED db

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == BeginTx \/ Read(k) \/ Write(k, v) \/ Commit \/ Abort

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<db, txns, nextTxId>>

(* Type correctness *)
TypeOK == /\ db \in [Keys(db) -> Nat]
          /\ txns \in [Keys(txns) -> TxState]
          /\ nextTxId \in Nat

====

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, epsilon
VARIABLES clocks, offsets


vars == <<clocks, offsets>>

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N:
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
          /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + RandomOffset]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<clocks, offsets>> \- except for i

RandomOffset == CHOOSE o \in -5..5: TRUE

TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
          /\ offsets \in [1..N -> Int]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
          /\ turn' = 2
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
          /\ turn' = 1
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Updates
VARIABLES infected, known


vars == <<known, infected>>

Init == /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]
        /\ infected = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : \E j \in 1..N : i # j
          /\ known' = [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = i THEN known[k] \cup known[j] ELSE known[k]]
          /\ infected' = [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = i THEN infected[k] \cup infected[j] ELSE infected[k]]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N : \E u \in Updates :
          /\ known' = [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = i THEN known[k] \cup {u} ELSE known[k]]
          /\ infected' = [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = i THEN infected[k] \cup {u} ELSE infected[k]]


Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ \A i \in 1..N : known[i] \subseteq Updates
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : infected[i] \subseteq Updates

====

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Client
VARIABLES allocated, c, free


Pages == 1..N

vars == <<free, allocated>>

Init == 
  /\ free = Pages
  /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == 
  /\ \E c \in Client : \E p \in free :
       /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
       /\ free' = free \ {p}
  \/ \E c \in Client : \E p \in allocated[c] :
       /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
       /\ free' = free \cup {p}
  \/ /\ free' = free
     /\ allocated' = allocated

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ free \subseteq Pages
  /\ \A c \in Client: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
  /\ \A c \in Client: \A p \in allocated[c]: p \in Pages
  /\ \A c \in Client: \A p \in allocated[c]: \A c' \in Client: p \notin allocated[c']

====

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES subscribers, messages, nextMsgId

(* --algorithm Broker
actions
  Init ==  /\ subscribers == <<>>
          /\ messages = <<>>
          /\ nextMsgId = 0
  Next ==  \/ Register(subscriber, topic)
          \/ PostMessage(topic, content)
  Register(subscriber, topic) ==  /\ subscriber \in 1..N
                                /\ topic \in 1..T
                                /\ subscribers' = Append(subscribers, [subscriber |-> subscriber, topic |-> topic])
                                /\ UNCHANGED messages
                                /\ UNCHANGED nextMsgId
  PostMessage(topic, content) ==  /\ topic \in 1..T
                                 /\ content \in 1..C
                                 /\ messages' = Append(messages, [msgId |-> nextMsgId, topic |-> topic, content |-> content])
                                 /\ nextMsgId' = nextMsgId + 1
                                 /\ UNCHANGED subscribers
  Deliver(subscriber, topic, content) ==  /\ subscriber \in 1..N
                                          /\ topic \in 1..T
                                          /\ content \in 1..C
                                          /\ Deliver(subscriber, topic, content)
  DeliverAll ==  /\ \A subscriber \in 1..N: \A topic \in 1..T: \A content \in 1..C: Deliver(subscriber, topic, content)
*)
Init == /\ subscribers == <<>>
        /\ messages = <<>>
        /\ nextMsgId = 0

Next ==  \/ Register(subscriber, topic)
        \/ PostMessage(topic, content)

Register(subscriber, topic) == /\ subscriber \in 1..N
                              /\ topic \in 1..T
                              /\ subscribers' = Append(subscribers, [subscriber |-> subscriber, topic |-> topic])
                              /\ UNCHANGED messages
                              /\ UNCHANGED nextMsgId

PostMessage(topic, content) == /\ topic \in 1..T
                              /\ content \in 1..C
                              /\ messages' = Append(messages, [msgId |-> nextMsgId, topic |-> topic, content |-> content])
                              /\ nextMsgId' = nextMsgId + 1
                              /\ UNCHANGED subscribers

TypeOK == /\ subscribers \in Seq([subscriber: 1..N)
          /\ messages \in Seq([msgId: 0..nextMsgId-1)
          /\ nextMsgId \in 0..nextMsgIdMax

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars where vars == <<subscribers, messages, nextMsgId>>
====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == 
  /\ turn = 0
  /\ wants = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]

Next == 
  /\ turn' = turn
  /\ wants' = wants
  /\ \E i \in 1..2 :
       /\ wants[i] = FALSE
       /\ turn = i
       /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
       /\ turn' = 3 - i
       /\ \E j \in 1..2 :
            /\ j # i
            /\ wants[j] = FALSE
            /\ turn' = 3 - j
            /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![j] = TRUE]
            /\ turn' = 3 - j
  /\ \E i \in 1..2 :
       /\ wants[i] = TRUE
       /\ turn = i
       /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
       /\ turn' = turn
  /\ \E i \in 1..2 :
       /\ wants[i] = TRUE
       /\ turn = 3 - i
       /\ wants' = wants
       /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ turn \in 1..2
  /\ wants \in [1..2 -> BOOLEAN]

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node

VARIABLES counts, node

TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
          /\ node \in Node

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]
        /\ node \in Node

Next == /\ \E n \in Node :
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![node][n] = counts[node][n] + 1]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<node>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts, node>>

GlobalCount == \SUM n \in Node : \MAX m \in Node : counts[m][n]
==> Spec => <> (GlobalCount = \SUM n \in Node : \MAX m \in Node : counts[m][n])
---- MODULE GCounter ----
====
